note: New dashboard card 'PHASE 2 MINERS · since #7100' next to UNIQUE MINERS. Counts distinct miner addresses across post-7100 blocks in the diffs[] window. Color-coded centralisation indicator: red < 2 ('centralised' / 'no Phase 2 miners'), amber = 2 ('thin'), green >= 3 ('healthy'). Lets operators spot adoption gaps without opening DTD. Companion change in sost-miner.cpp (separate commit) updates Phase 2 FATAL messages with explicit upgrade guidance and the sostcore.com banner URL.
